label: Skill need (direct per-level)
description: Returns the value at the pawn's skill level from a direct per-level list. Falls back to the last value when level exceeds the list length.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# SkillNeed subclass used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

required.label: Required
required.description: If true, the pawn must have this skill for the stat to be enabled.

valuesPerLevel.label: Values per level
valuesPerLevel.description: Direct lookup table of values indexed by skill level (0-based). Level beyond the list uses the last entry.
